title: class_2_notification_payload_schema_v1_0_0
description: Authoritative schema for caregiver escalation payload emitted when the system transitions to Class 2 escalation. This schema governs the outbound Class 2 notification contract and should not be overridden by companion output-profile assets.

event_summary.description: Short summary of the triggering event.

context_summary.description: Short summary of the relevant environmental and device context.

unresolved_reason.description: Human-readable reason why autonomous handling was not completed.

manual_confirmation_path.description: Instruction or route by which a caregiver can review, confirm, deny, or intervene. This field may describe a governed manual confirmation path, but does not by itself authorize autonomous low-risk execution or sensitive actuation.

audit_correlation_id.description: Correlation ID linking the escalation payload to audit logs and upstream events.

notification_channel.description: Outbound channel used to deliver the escalation payload.

source_layer.description: System layer that initiated the Class 2 escalation.
